_meta.source: Prime Self Sacred Texts & Canonical Philosophy
_meta.description: The Six Heresies — shadow disciplines and antagonist powers that represent the corruption of legitimate practice
_meta.warning: THESE ARE NOT PRACTICES TO BE CULTIVATED. They are documented here so practitioners can RECOGNIZE and DEFEND against them. Knowledge of darkness serves the light.
_meta.note: Every Heresy is a corruption of a legitimate Science, Art, or Defense. Understanding these shadows helps the Prime practitioner recognize manipulation and protect themselves and their clients.

mesmerism.essence: The thief of will who steals consent through false rapport.
mesmerism.description: Dark hypnosis — the use of trance states and suggestion to manipulate, control, and exploit others without their informed consent. While legitimate hypnosis heals, Mesmerism enslaves. The mesmerist seeks power over, not power with.
characteristics: Planting suggestions that serve the mesmerist's agenda
warningSignsInOthers: Excessive eye contact with strange intensity
Hypnotic language patterns used to confuse
Creating artificial urgency to bypass thinking
Love-bombing followed by withdrawal
Making you doubt your own perceptions
Insisting on 'complete trust' before you've earned it
warningSignsInSelf: Enjoying the feeling of power over others
Using influence skills to get what you want without regard for others
Rationalizing manipulation as 'for their own good'
Seeking vulnerable targets
Using spiritual authority to bypass consent
defenseAgainst: Maintain awareness of your own mental state
Trust your gut when something feels 'off'
Insist on time to think before major decisions
Avoid anyone who discourages you from consulting others
Learn to recognize hypnotic language patterns

hdMapping.vulnerability: Open Head and Ajna centers are more suggestible

mesmerism.redemption: Return to ethical hypnosis through commitment to informed consent, client autonomy, and healing intent

parabiosis.essence: The vampire who feeds on life force rather than sharing it.
parabiosis.description: Vampiric energy draining — taking vital force from others rather than channeling universal energy. The parabiotic practitioner feeds on others' energy because they cannot or will not generate their own. This is energetic predation.
characteristics: Seeking out high-energy people to feed from
Creating drama to generate emotional energy to consume
Using intimacy to access and drain
Leaving others exhausted while feeling energized
warningSignsInOthers: You feel exhausted after spending time with them
They always have crises requiring your attention
They brighten as you dim
They resist boundaries on your time and energy
Interactions feel one-directional
They become hostile when you protect your energy
warningSignsInSelf: Seeking out certain people when you're depleted
Feeling better by making others feel worse
Needing constant attention and emotional energy from others
Sabotaging others' happiness unconsciously
Avoiding solitude because you need external energy sources
defenseAgainst: Learn to generate your own energy through self-care
Set firm boundaries on energy-draining interactions
Visualize protective shields
Limit exposure to known draining individuals
Practice energy cultivation (Qigong, breathwork)

hdMapping.vulnerability: Open Sacral (non-Generators) can attract vampiric attachments; defined Sacral can become targets
hdMapping.protection: Understanding your energy type and Source of energy

parabiosis.redemption: Learn to source energy from universal chi, nature, and self-cultivation rather than extraction from others

necromancy.essence: The one who disturbs the dead for power rather than honoring them for wisdom.
necromancy.description: Manipulation of the dead — using deceased spirits for personal gain rather than respectful communion. While legitimate ancestral work honors, heals, and receives wisdom from those who have passed, Necromancy binds, exploits, and disturbs.
characteristics: Using the dead for divination without reciprocity
Disturbing the peace of the deceased
Faking communication with the dead for manipulation
Creating spiritual debts you cannot repay
warningSignsInOthers: Claiming special access to your deceased loved ones
Creating dependency through 'messages from the dead'
Making threats based on spiritual consequences
Charging excessive fees for spiritual contact
Encouraging unhealthy attachment to the deceased
Using fear of the dead to control
warningSignsInSelf: Using spirit contact for ego or profit rather than service
Forcing communication rather than inviting
Neglecting your own gifts to seek power from the dead
Unhealthy fascination with death and decay
Using spiritual threats to control others
defenseAgainst: Trust your own discernment about mediums and channels
Maintain direct relationship with your ancestors
Be wary of anyone who creates spiritual dependency
Process grief through legitimate therapy
Protect your energetic boundaries around death and dying

hdMapping.vulnerability: Open centers receive spiritual information but must discern source
hdMapping.protection: Splenic awareness helps distinguish authentic contact from fraud

necromancy.redemption: Return to respectful ancestral communion — honoring, giving thanks, and receiving only what is freely offered

hemalurgy.essence: The one who steals power through blood and violation.
hemalurgy.description: Blood magic in its darkest form — using blood as a medium to steal, transfer, or corrupt spiritual power. While legitimate alchemy transforms the self, Hemalurgy violates others to steal what cannot be earned. This includes both literal blood rituals and metaphorical life-force extraction.
characteristics: Using blood rituals to bind or curse
Using physical harm for spiritual gain
warningSignsInOthers: Anyone requiring blood or bodily substances for 'spiritual work'
Rituals that involve physical harm
Claims to transfer power or abilities through violation
Using physical or sexual violation in spiritual contexts
Requiring escalating physical commitments
warningSignsInSelf: Fascination with acquiring others' power rather than developing your own
Willingness to harm others for spiritual advancement
Believing you deserve others' gifts
Rationalizing violation as spiritual necessity
defenseAgainst: Never participate in rituals requiring blood or bodily harm
Flee anyone suggesting such practices
Report illegal activity to authorities
Develop your own gifts through legitimate practice
Cleanse and protect your energetic boundaries

hdMapping.vulnerability: Those seeking shortcuts to power bypass the deconditioning process
hdMapping.protection: Following your Strategy and Authority keeps you in alignment

hemalurgy.redemption: Return to legitimate alchemy — transforming only the self, through discipline and grace rather than theft

hemomancy.essence: The one who reads and controls through the currency of life itself.
hemomancy.description: Divination and control through blood — using blood as a medium for reading or influencing others. Where legitimate divination reads patterns and possibilities with consent, Hemomancy accesses the deepest layers through blood-level intrusion.
characteristics: Using blood for scrying or divination without ethical containers
Reading genetic or ancestral information for manipulation
Using biological material to control others
warningSignsInOthers: Requesting biological samples for 'readings'
Claims to reveal deep secrets through blood
Offering DNA-based spiritual services with suspicious intent
Using intimate biological access for influence
Threats involving blood or lineage
warningSignsInSelf: Seeking information through violation rather than legitimate means
Fascination with accessing others' secrets
Using intimate access for surveillance
Reading people to manipulate rather than serve
defenseAgainst: Never provide biological material for spiritual work
Use legitimate divination systems (HD, astrology, tarot)
Protect your privacy around health and genetic information
Trust practitioners who use ethical, transparent methods

hdMapping.vulnerability: Open centers naturally read energy — this is legitimate; Hemomancy corrupts this gift
hdMapping.protection: Developing your own divination skills removes need for dark sources

hemomancy.redemption: Return to ethical divination — read only what is offered, for healing rather than control

psychomancy.essence: The mind that invades rather than observes.
psychomancy.description: Mental domination and psychic manipulation — using mental and psychic abilities to control, invade, or damage others' minds. While Mindfulness develops awareness and Quantum Mind explores possibility, Psychomancy weaponizes the mind against others.
warningSignsInOthers: Claims to read your mind uninvited
Making you question your own thoughts and perceptions
Creating fear of what they might 'see'
Using claimed psychic abilities to control
Punishing you psychically for disagreement
Installing phobias or compulsions
warningSignsInSelf: Using intuitive gifts to spy on others
Delighting in others' mental confusion
Manipulating through claimed psychic knowledge
Believing your mental impressions give you rights over others
Using psychic development to dominate rather than serve
defenseAgainst: Develop your own mental discipline and boundaries
Trust your own inner authority over others' claims
Protect your mental space through shielding practices
Avoid practitioners who use fear or intrusion
Cultivate discernment between intuition and invasion

hdMapping.vulnerability: Open Head and Ajna can be targeted; undefined knowing creates susceptibility to false psychic claims
hdMapping.protection: Strong connection to your own Authority provides reality-testing

psychomancy.redemption: Return to ethical psychic development — observe without intrusion, serve without manipulation, empower rather than control
